name: Timing engine external validation vs ARIEL3 (INCONCLUSIVE)

source_receipts.anchor: PFI distributions not statistically different (chi2 p=0.12);

verbatim_evidence.claim: PFI distributions not statistically different (chi2 p=0.12); TOST equivalence +/-10pp narrowly missed (p=0.073); 4.5pp diff below 8pp power threshold
Equivalence INCONCLUSIVE (underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result. ARIEL3 IPD not shipped; reported as-is.

attributes.statistic: PFI distributions not statistically different (chi2 p=0.12); TOST equivalence +/-10pp narrowly missed (p=0.073); 4.5pp diff below 8pp power threshold
